info.name: Umba FX Engine
info.description: Production-grade FX engine — FastAPI + PostgreSQL + SQLAlchemy

request.description: Health check — verifies DB and reports rate staleness.
View all currency balances for a customer.
Credit a customer balance. Test fixture only.
Get a single customer by ID.
Create a new customer with zero balances in all currencies.

Execute a quote — debit source, credit destination atomically.
Optional Idempotency-Key header makes retries safe.
Get a single quote by ID.
List all quotes, optionally filtered by customer_id.

Generate a locked-in FX quote valid for 60 seconds.
Rate is guaranteed — honoured at execution regardless of market movement.

Refresh rates from upstream source.
On failure: keeps serving last known rates — see SPEC.md.
View current buy/sell rates for all supported pairs.
Get a single transaction by ID.
List all transactions, optionally filtered by customer_id.
